violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the back storage area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler fan guards, ceiling, and display shelving have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2024
